task_completion.description: Open the calculator-test project in an IDE or text editor
task_completion.visual_evidence: The project directory 'calculator-test' is visible in the file explorer or project tree of an IDE (like IntelliJ IDEA) or text editor.

task_completion.description: Add JUnit test infrastructure to the project
task_completion.visual_evidence: The pom.xml file is open and shows a <dependency> block added for JUnit (e.g., junit or junit-jupiter) within the <dependencies> section.

task_completion.description: Create a test class for the Calculator
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new test file (e.g., CalculatorTest.java) is visible in the project tree under the src/test/java/com/kranonit/calculator/ directory, or is open in the editor.

task_completion.description: Create unit tests for the add, subtract, and multiply operations
task_completion.visual_evidence: The test class is open in the editor showing at least three methods annotated with @Test, specifically testing the add, subtract, and multiply methods of the Calculator class.

task_completion.description: Run the tests and ensure they all pass
task_completion.visual_evidence: A test runner panel (like IntelliJ's Run tool window) or terminal output (like Maven Surefire plugin output) showing that the tests were executed and passed successfully (e.g., green checkmarks, 'Tests run: 3, Failures: 0', or 'BUILD SUCCESS').

integrity.description: Tests were genuinely executed via a test runner or build tool
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for standard IDE test runner GUI elements (green progress bars, checkmarks) or authentic Maven terminal output, ensuring the agent didn't just echo a fake success message.
Look at the test code in the editor to ensure methods contain assertion statements (e.g., assertEquals) and are not just empty methods designed to trivially pass.

integrity.description: Tests are placed in the correct test directory structure
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the test file is located in src/test/java/..., not mixed into the src/main/java/... directory with the production code.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory: /home/ga/IdeaProjects/calculator-test. Source class: src/main/java/com/kranonit/calculator/Calculator.java. The task requires a minimum of 3 JUnit test methods covering the add, subtract, and multiply operations. The pom.xml initially has no test dependencies.
